sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκμυκτερίζω

- Transliteration: Ekmukterizo

- Phonetic: ek-mook-ter-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to deride by turning up the nose, to sneer at, to scoff at

- Origin: from G1537 and G3456

- TDNT entry: 17:16,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G3456; to sneer outright at: - deride.
